faqs.question: What types of spiders are most common in Hempstead homes?
faqs.answer: Hempstead properties commonly see house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows in undisturbed areas. Our technicians are trained to identify and effectively treat all spider species found in Long Island homes, using targeted methods that eliminate current infestations and prevent future problems.
